context.note: No database migrations required - uses existing data with aggregation queries
context.trend_calculation: Compare 7-day averages: - Improving: recent avg < older avg * 0.9 - Degrading: recent avg > older avg * 1.1 - Stable: within 10% of previous

objective.goal: Create new /explorer page with tabbed navigation
Show duration metrics (avg, min, max, p95) and trends

success_criteria.criterion: Tests sorted by avg duration (slowest first)
Empty state shows when no data

frontend.navigation:
import Link from "next/link"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { BarChart3 } from "lucide-react"; // In header section:
console.log("Selected:", sig)} />

endpoint.description: Get slowest tests with duration metrics

testing_checklist.test: Tests sorted by avg duration (slowest first)
Empty state shows when no data
